title: Forever Phase
description: what vanilla minecraft wishes it was
body:
basically for if you wanna play vanilla, with around double the content. the modpack expands on existing features, while also adding new ones. content includes (but is not limited to): 

- updated overworld, nether, & end biomes
- new biomes to explore
- new & overhauled structures
- new mobs
- new tools & treasure to find 
- built-in multiplayer
- optimized for lower end devices
  
side note: as the pack is in its early stages, there may be bugs here and there. they'll be sorted out asap

please enjoy :)
